name: Applied Materials

screener.note: Borderline valuation (Score 1.01 vs 1 limit) (REJECT: Stalled at WAIT with base CAGR 12% < 15%)

bullCase: Applied Materials has the broadest portfolio in semiconductor equipment — CVD, PVD, CMP, inspection, and display. Its AGS (Applied Global Services) segment generates $6B+ in high-margin recurring revenue from installed base maintenance, providing a 40%+ revenue floor through downturns. Advanced packaging (CoWoS, HBM) is a new growth vector where AMAT has strong positioning.
bearCase: China revenues (~30% of total) are structurally at risk from escalating US export controls. If additional equipment restrictions are imposed, AMAT loses its single-largest growth market. Semiconductor equipment spending is among the most capital-intensive and volatile categories — a WFE downcycle of 20%+ is not uncommon. Concentrated customer risk (TSMC, Samsung, Intel).
description: Applied Materials, Inc. provides materials engineering solutions, equipment, services, and software to the semiconductor and related industries in the United States, China, Korea, Taiwan, Japan, So...
